turns.content: I literally cannot contain myself right now I have to tell someone or I'm going to explode
Okay I'm all ears, what's going on?!

ok so you are literally talking to an ENGAGED WOMAN right now because Marco popped the question last weekend and I said YES and I still can't breathe. like I have a ring on my finger right now and I keep looking at it and it doesn't feel real ay dios mio
CONGRATULATIONS!! That is such amazing news! I'm so happy for you! Tell me everything — how did he propose? I want the full story!

ok so I thought we were just going to dinner at this Italian place we like in Pilsen right, nothing fancy I was literally wearing jeans and a sweater because he said it was casual. and then we get there and he had arranged with the restaurant to have this private little table in the back with candles and flowers and I was like wait what is happening
Oh my gosh, the casual misdirect so you wouldn't suspect anything — that's so sweet and clever. So what happened when you saw the setup? Did you know right away what was about to happen?

I swear my heart stopped. like my brain was putting it together but also NOT because I kept thinking no way not tonight I literally have mascara smudged under my eye from a 12 hour shift. and then he started talking about how we met and how I make him feel like home and I just lost it I was crying before he even got the ring out

That is absolutely beautiful. The fact that it happened on a regular night when you were just being yourself — mascara smudge and all — honestly makes it even more perfect. It wasn't about some big production, it was about the two of you. What does the ring look like?

it's this oval cut diamond with a thin gold band and it's not huge or anything but it's SO elegant and perfect and he said he picked it because I always said I don't like flashy stuff which is true and the fact that he remembered that and actually listened?? I'm going to cry again just typing this lol

A man who listens to what you actually want instead of just going for the biggest ring — that says so much about him and your relationship. An oval cut with a thin gold band sounds gorgeous and timeless. Have you told your family yet? I'm guessing your mom had a reaction.

oh my GOD my mom. so we FaceTimed her right from the restaurant and she literally SCREAMED and started crying and then my dad grabbed the phone and he was trying to be all cool about it but his voice was cracking and then my sister grabbed the phone and was yelling WEDDING WEDDING WEDDING and it was absolute chaos and the people at the next table were clapping it was so embarrassing but also amazing

Ha, that sounds like the most perfect chaotic family reaction ever! Your dad trying to keep it together while his voice cracks is the most dad thing. And your sister's excitement — she sounds like she's going to be an amazing part of the wedding. How are you feeling now that it's been a few days? Has it sunk in yet?

honestly no it hasn't sunk in at all. like I go to work and I'm starting IVs and charting and then I look down at my hand and I'm like oh right I'm getting MARRIED. one of the nurses on my unit saw the ring and word spread so fast I had like 15 people congratulating me during shift change lol. and Marco keeps calling me his fiancee which makes me giggle every time like we're teenagers or something

That giddy "fiancee" phase is the best — enjoy every second of it! And how sweet that your coworkers were so excited for you. It sounds like you and Marco have something really special. Have you two talked at all about what kind of wedding you want, or are you just soaking in the engagement for now?

we're trying to just enjoy it for a little bit before we go full planning mode but I already made a secret Pinterest board at like 3am during my shift last night because I have no self control lmao. I'm thinking something small-ish, maybe like 80-100 people, nothing crazy. my mom already has opinions though which is very on brand for her

The secret 3am Pinterest board during your shift is absolutely hilarious — that's the most excited-bride-on-night-shift thing I've ever heard. 80-100 people sounds like a great size, big enough to include everyone important but intimate enough to actually enjoy it. And of course your mom has opinions already! That's what moms do. Are you thinking Chicago wedding?

definitely Chicago yeah, this is home. there are some beautiful venues in the city and Marco's family is all here too so it just makes sense. I can't believe I'm going to be someone's WIFE. like little Elena from the west side who used to play nurse with her stuffed animals is getting married to the most amazing man. I'm so happy I could burst honestly. thank you for letting me just gush about this I needed to get it all out lol

You deserve every bit of this happiness! From playing nurse with stuffed animals to an actual nurse with a ring on her finger and an amazing partner — that's a beautiful journey. Enjoy this time, soak it all in, keep adding to that secret Pinterest board at 3am, and let your mom have her opinions. This is going to be an incredible chapter for you and Marco. Congratulations again, truly.
